comment:
$$\frac{2\cdot 3^{2x+1}-7\cdot 6^x+2\cdot 4^x}{3\cdot 9^x-3^x\cdot 2^{x+1}}\leq 1 \Rightarrow \frac{6\cdot 3^{2x}-7\cdot 3^x\cdot 2^x+2\cdot 2^{2x}-(3\cdot 3^{2x}-2\cdot 3^x\cdot 2^x)}{3\cdot 3^{2x}-2\cdot 3^x\cdot 2^x}\leq 0\Rightarrow \\ \Rightarrow \frac{3\cdot 3^{2x}-5\cdot 3^x\cdot 2^x+2\cdot 2^{2x}}{3\cdot 3^{2x}-2\cdot 3^x\cdot 2^x}\leq 0\Rightarrow \frac{2^{2x}\left(3\cdot \frac{3^{2x}}{2^{2x}}-5\cdot\frac{3^{x}}{2^{x}}+2\right)}{2^{2x}\left(3\cdot \frac{3^{2x}}{2^{2x}}-2\cdot\frac{3^{x}}{2^{x}}\right)}\leq 0$$
Пусть \(\frac{3^{x}}{2^{x}}=k\), тогда:
$$\frac{3k^2-5k+2}{3k^2-2k}\leq 0\Rightarrow \frac{3k^2-5k+2}{k(3k-2)}\leq 0\Rightarrow \frac{(3k-2)(k-1)}{k(3k-2)}\leq 0$$
Получим:
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 0< k< \frac{2}{3}\\ \frac{2}{3} < k\leq 1 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 0< \frac{3^{x}}{2^{x}} < \frac{2}{3}\\ \frac{2}{3} < \frac{3^{x}}{2^{x}} \leq 1 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \left(\frac{3}{2}\right)^{x} < \left(\frac{3}{2}\right)^{-1}\\ \left(\frac{3}{2}\right)^{-1} < \left(\frac{3}{2}\right)^{x} \leq \left(\frac{3}{2}\right)^{0} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x< -1\\ -1< x\leq 0 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow x\in ( -\infty ;-1) \cup ( -1;0] \end{array}$$
Ответ: \(( -\infty ;-1)\cup ( -1;0]\)
